prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and muscle gain for powerlifting competition

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals for one full day
Provides high protein intake (minimum 1.7g per kg body weight)
Includes specific meal timing and portion sizes appropriate for strength training
Incorporates balanced macronutrient ratios suitable for a strength athlete
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) requiring high protein intake and specific macronutrient ratios

prompt_inputs.goal: Cut weight to 71 kg for competition while maintaining strength and performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 3 meals spanning one full day
Total daily caloric intake is in a safe deficit range (approximately 1800-2000 calories)
All meals comply with stated dietary restrictions (no dairy, no processed foods)
Plan includes protein-rich options to preserve muscle mass during weight cut
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport requiring weight management (boxer/wrestler) with caloric restrictions while maintaining performance

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high-endurance athlete requiring 3000+ calories with carbohydrate emphasis

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories
Carbohydrates comprise at least 55-60% of total calories
Plan includes 4-5 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day
All meals are practical and compact for a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrates

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals for one day
All meals are vegan with plant-based protein sources
Total daily protein supports muscle maintenance for 72 kg athlete
Includes complete amino acid profiles across meals
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a vegan/plant-based athlete with limited protein sources and complete amino acid considerations

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and increase endurance for competitive cycling

solution_criteria: All meals are gluten-free, dairy-free, and free of nuts
Plan includes adequate protein for muscle building (~1.6-2.0g per kg body weight)
Meals are practical and quick to prepare for a single day
Plan is compact and concise (brief format, not extensive)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete with multiple dietary restrictions (gluten-free, dairy-free, nut allergy) simultaneously

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize endurance performance for 5:30 AM training session

solution_criteria: Includes pre-dawn meal (consumed 30-60 minutes before 5:30 AM training) with easily digestible carbohydrates and minimal fiber
Provides balanced meals throughout the day totaling appropriate calories for an endurance athlete
All meals comply with lactose intolerance and nut-free restrictions
Meal plan is formatted as a single day schedule with specific meal times
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an early morning training session athlete requiring pre-dawn nutrition and quick-digestion meals

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and increase strength for competitive soccer

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals for one day with appropriate portion sizes for a 65 kg adolescent athlete
Includes adequate protein intake (approximately 1.2-1.6g per kg body weight) from vegetarian sources suitable for muscle building
All meals and snacks comply with vegetarian and nut-free restrictions
Plan is concise and formatted for quick reference
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a young adolescent athlete (14-16 years old) with different nutritional needs than adult athletes

prompt_inputs.goal: Compete in evening track and field events (6 PM start) with optimal energy and minimal digestive discomfort

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans one full day with specific times for each meal/snack
Final meal or snack is consumed at least 2-3 hours before 6 PM competition to avoid digestive issues
All meals and snacks comply with stated dietary restrictions (no dairy, no nuts)
Meals progress from heavier to lighter as competition time approaches
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete competing in evening events needing meal timing that avoids digestive discomfort during performance

prompt_inputs.goal: Sustained energy and optimal recovery for soccer player with two training sessions (morning and evening)

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and at least one snack between training sessions
Includes appropriate macronutrient distribution for sustained energy and recovery needs of a team sport athlete
All meals and snacks comply with vegetarian diet and nut-free restrictions
Meal plan is presented in compact, concise format suitable for a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a team sport athlete (soccer player) requiring sustained energy and recovery meals between multiple training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle while maintaining budget under $15 for the day
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegetarian, no nuts or nut butters

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 3 meals spanning one full day
All foods are budget-friendly staples (rice, beans, eggs, oats, canned goods, frozen vegetables)
Total daily protein meets minimum 100g for muscle building
Respects vegetarian and nut-free restrictions
Estimated total cost does not exceed $15
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a budget-conscious athlete with limitations on expensive superfoods and specialty products
